SEO.description: Mentor Career Consulting offers professional consultancy for language schools, university, master and summer school programs abroad. Get free advice for Germany, UK, Canada and more.
SEO.keywords: study abroad, university applications, study in germany, language school abroad, master's degree abroad, student visa, high school abroad, summer school, education consultancy, Mentor Career Consulting

SEO.ogDescription: Turn your study abroad dreams into reality with Mentor Career Consulting's expert academic mentorship.

AboutUs.title: Why Mentor Career Consulting?
AboutUs.content: At every stage from high school to postgraduate education, Mentor Career Consulting leads you for better career planning and educational life. It lists study abroad schools, work & travel opportunities, and language schools that you can choose according to your education level. It guides you in making a choice suitable for your budget and needs. It provides you with up-to-date information by researching the countries where you want to receive education.
AboutUs.cta: Call us now to make a career planning that can be globally valid with our education consultancy services!

meta.title: Career Planning | Self-Discovery | Mentor Career Consulting
meta.description: Shape your future with career coaching and individual recognition sessions. Get to know yourself and set your goals.

hero.label: Plan Your Future
hero.title: Career Planning
hero.subtitle: Discover yourself to take happier steps in your life journey.

intro.title: Career Planning
intro.content: Self-discovery is a process conducted for an individual to primarily get to know themselves and know what they can do. A person who does not know themselves will eventually be unhappy in the tasks they perform. The most important reason for this is that the person does not weigh whether they are suitable for a job from the very beginning. For jobs that require a lot of social interaction, people who are more inclined to this, warm and sincere, and like to talk to people should work. However, when more introverted people apply for such jobs, they may want to quit after a while by not liking the job. This leads to a loss of time for both the employer and the employee.

whySelfDiscovery.title: Why Should a Person Know Themselves?
whySelfDiscovery.content: If a person knows themselves, they can better understand their life goals. For this purpose, we organize individual recognition sessions with a career coach. After the things the person enjoys doing, the things they do not like, and their strengths and weaknesses are determined, it becomes easier to find the jobs they can do specifically. This serves as a guide for people to hold on to life and love themselves. A person should first know and love themselves. After that, they can look at life more positively by loving their job, their life, the place they work, their home, and their neighborhood.

strengthsAndWeaknesses.title: Strengths and Weaknesses
strengthsAndWeaknesses.content: Knowing one's strengths and weaknesses is the most important factor in moving towards the right job. By focusing on your strengths, you can increase your chances of success, and by developing your weaknesses, you can become more equipped. In career planning, this analysis sheds light on drawing the most suitable career path for you.

roadmap.title: Roadmap with a Career Coach
roadmap.content: You are not alone in your career journey. Together with our expert career coaches, we evaluate the most suitable education and job opportunities for you and plan concrete steps to reach your goals. This roadmap is the safest route that will lead you to success.

whoIsItFor.title: Who is Career Planning Suitable For?
whoIsItFor.content: Career planning is of critical importance for students, recent graduates, or anyone who wants to make a change in their career. Whatever stage you are in, receiving professional support will save you time and energy.

goals.title: Long-term and Short-term Goals
goals.content: The road to success goes through setting the right goals. Your short-term goals motivate you, while your long-term goals determine your vision. In our career planning sessions, we clarify these goals and secure your future.

benefits.title: What Does a Person Gain from Individual Recognition?
benefits.content: Most people actually live their lives and complete their lifespan without thinking about what they love. However, a more smiling and positive life is possible... We are not racehorses. Therefore, we should first remember why we came to life, love ourselves, and make the right decision about what we want to do. We should set goals by focusing on ourselves at our core, not by thinking about the environment. Thus, by doing the things we love, we can realize our goals in life and always protect our self-respect.

howToDiscover.title: How Do You Recognize Yourself?
howToDiscover.content: Recognizing yourself may be easy to say but hard to implement. Sometimes a person finds it difficult to find their own mistakes and missing parts. Therefore, they need an external perspective to know themselves. Your career coach helps you understand your life purpose, the things you want to do, and the things you do not enjoy and do because others want them, from a completely neutral perspective. For this, they ask various questions and try to help you learn about the things you are satisfied with and not satisfied with about yourself.

moveForward.title: Move Forward with Us in Your Career Journey
moveForward.content: Take the first step today for a happy and successful future. As Mentor Career Consulting, we are here to maximize your potential.

sections.footer: If you also want to take happier steps in your life journey and receive an individual recognition session, you can contact us.

global.title: International Exam Preparation and Consultancy
global.overview:
International Exam Preparation and Consultancy

One of the most critical steps in achieving your study abroad and career goals is international language and academic proficiency exams. As Mentor Career Consulting, we do not leave your success to chance.

We provide consultancy across a wide range of exams, from language proficiency exams like IELTS and TOEFL to academic competency exams like SAT, GRE, and GMAT. We are with you with our expert team in exam formats, strategic preparation methods, and application processes.

advantages.title: Expert Instructor Staff
advantages.desc: Opportunity to work with experienced and certified instructors who master exam formats.

advantages.title: Personalized Program
advantages.desc: Special study plans focusing on your deficiencies and oriented towards your goals.

advantages.title: Up-to-date Materials
advantages.desc: Realistic preparation with the latest exam questions and simulation tests.

process.title: Level Determination
process.desc: Analysis of your current status and determination of the target score.

process.title: Strategic Planning
process.desc: Intensive or regular study program according to the exam date.

process.title: Mock Exams
process.desc: Periodic simulations for time management and stress control.

process.title: Application Support
process.desc: Exam registration and the process of sending results to universities.

faq.q: Which exam should I take?
faq.a: This depends on the country, university, and department you are targeting. Our consultants will determine the most suitable exam for you.

faq.q: How long does exam preparation take?
faq.a: Depending on your current level and target score, it usually takes 2-6 months.

toefl.title: TOEFL iBT (Test of English as a Foreign Language)
toefl.description: An academic English exam widely accepted especially in US universities.
toefl.overview_short: TOEFL iBT is administered by the Educational Testing Service (ETS). It is academic-oriented and can provide an advantage for candidates accustomed to digital exam formats due to its computer-based structure.

sections.name: Speaking
sections.desc: Voice response by recording over the computer.

toefl.scoring_short: Scored out of a total of 120 points.
toefl.dates: Once a week or more frequently
whyTake: It is the gold standard for candidates applying for undergraduate or graduate programs in the USA.
Ideal for those who want to document academic-oriented English proficiency.
Accepted by more than 12,000 institutions worldwide.

serviceDetails.overview:
TOEFL iBT: Academic English Standard

TOEFL (Test of English as a Foreign Language) is the most preferred language exam, especially by universities in the USA and Canada. It measures your ability to use and understand English in an academic environment.

The iBT (internet-Based Test) format is the most widely used version worldwide. It is based on measuring Reading, Listening, Speaking, and Writing skills in an integrated way.

advantages.title: US Focused Admission
advantages.desc: Primarily accepted by more than 90% of universities in the USA.

advantages.title: Comprehensive Assessment
advantages.desc: Offers realistic academic scenarios where skills are used together.

advantages.title: Wide Exam Network
advantages.desc: Exam centers are available at frequent intervals almost everywhere in the world.

process.title: Exam Strategy
process.desc: Note-taking and synthesis techniques for integrated tasks.

process.title: Resource Provision
process.desc: ETS approved official preparation guides and digital resources.

process.title: Simulation Tests
process.desc: Adaptation to the exam atmosphere with full-time mock exams.

process.title: Score Reporting
process.desc: Direct submission of results to target institutions.

faq.q: How is TOEFL iBT scored?
faq.a: The exam is scored out of a total of 120 points (30 points for each section).

faq.q: How long is the exam duration?
faq.a: With its new format, it takes approximately 2 hours.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Reading (35 min): Understanding academic texts. 20 questions.
  • Listening (36 min): Campus conversations and lectures. 28 questions.
  • Speaking (16 min): 4 tasks measuring speaking performance.
  • Writing (29 min): 2 tasks; Academic discussion and integrated writing.
serviceDetails.scoring:
TOEFL iBT is scored between 0 and 120 points. Each of the 4 sections is evaluated out of 30 points.

Note: With the MyBest® Scores feature, your highest section scores from the last 2 years can be combined.

ielts.title: IELTS (International English Language Testing System)
ielts.description: The most popular exam for immigration and education, especially in the UK, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand.
ielts.overview_short: IELTS is one of the most widely accepted English proficiency exams worldwide. It is co-managed by the British Council, IDP Education, and Cambridge Assessment English. It is an exam that directly measures communication skills, especially since the speaking part is conducted one-on-one.

sections.name: Listening
sections.desc: 4 sections, 40 questions. Conversations in various accents.

ielts.scoring_short: A band system from 0 to 9 is applied.
whyTake: Primary choice for those who want to study in the UK, Australia, Canada, and Europe.
May be mandatory for immigration or registration applications (UKVI).
Can be taken on paper or computer.

serviceDetails.overview:
IELTS: Globally Valid English Test

IELTS (International English Language Testing System) is the most preferred English proficiency exam worldwide. It has two modules: Academic and General Training.

It is accepted as a standard by universities and immigration offices in the UK, Australia, Canada, and New Zealand. The exam consists of Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking sections.

Why IELTS?

  • ✓ Wide Acceptance: Recognized by more than 11,000 institutions in more than 140 countries.
  • ✓ Face-to-Face Speaking: The speaking test is conducted with a real examiner, providing a more natural interaction.

advantages.title: Flexible Format
advantages.desc: Offers paper-based or computer-delivered exam options.

advantages.title: Fast Results
advantages.desc: Computer-delivered exam results are announced within 3-5 days.

advantages.title: Education and Career
advantages.desc: Valid for both university admissions and professional career applications.

process.title: Module Selection
process.desc: Determining the Academic or General Training module based on the goal.

process.title: Exam Registration
process.desc: Official registration for the appropriate date and center.

process.title: Preparation Course
process.desc: Strategic question-solving techniques and time management training.

process.title: Result Tracking
process.desc: Obtaining the TRF document and reporting to institutions.

faq.q: How long is the IELTS validity period?
faq.a: IELTS results are valid for 2 years.

faq.q: How many times can I take the exam?
faq.a: There is no restriction on the number of exam entries.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Listening (30 min): 4 sections, 40 questions. Daily and academic conversations.
  • Reading (60 min): 3 texts, 40 questions. Analytical reading and comprehension.
  • Writing (60 min): 2 tasks. Data interpretation and academic essay.
  • Speaking (11-14 min): One-on-one interview. Ability to express oneself.
serviceDetails.scoring:
IELTS uses a scoring system between 1.0 and 9.0. The average of the scores obtained from each section determines the overall score.

Target Scores: Generally 6.0-6.5 for undergraduate, 6.5-7.5 for graduate programs.

sat.title: SAT (Scholastic Aptitude Test)
sat.description: A standardized test used for undergraduate admissions in the US.
sat.overview_short: The SAT is organized by the College Board. Although many universities have a test-optional policy, a high SAT score can provide a significant advantage, especially in scholarship applications.

sections.name: Reading & Writing
sections.desc: Analysis and grammar through short texts.

sections.name: Math
sections.desc: Algebra, problem solving, and data analysis.

whyTake: The most important exam for students targeting undergraduate education in the USA.
For candidates who want to demonstrate academic success and analytical thinking skills.
Provides competitive advantage in scholarship applications.

serviceDetails.overview:
Digital SAT: Key to University Entrance in the USA

SAT (Scholastic Assessment Test) is the most common standardized exam used for undergraduate applications to colleges and universities in the USA. It measures students' high school knowledge and their potential for success in university.

Now conducted entirely in digital format, the SAT consists of Reading-Writing and Mathematics sections. It emphasizes critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

advantages.title: Scholarship Opportunities
advantages.desc: High SAT scores increase the chance of receiving academic scholarships from prestigious universities.

advantages.title: Global Application
advantages.desc: Accepted by many elite universities not only in the USA but worldwide.

advantages.title: Digital Convenience
advantages.desc: Offers personalized difficulty levels and shorter exam times with an adaptive test structure.

process.title: Math Foundation
process.desc: Specialization in algebra, problem solving, and data analysis.

process.title: Critical Reading
process.desc: Developing the ability to understand and analyze challenging texts.

process.title: Bluebook App
process.desc: Practicing with the official digital exam interface.

process.title: Time Management
process.desc: Strategies to use the time allocated for each section most efficiently.

faq.q: How is SAT scored?
faq.a: The exam is scored out of a total of 1600 points (800 points for each section).

faq.q: How often is the exam held?
faq.a: For international students, it is usually held 7 times a year.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Reading & Writing (64 min): Text analysis and grammar questions presented in two modules.
  • Mathematics (70 min): Two modules. Algebra and data analysis questions where calculator use is permitted.
serviceDetails.scoring:
The SAT score is between 400 and 1600. Each of the two main sections is evaluated out of 800 points.

Important: Wrong answers do not affect correct answers; therefore, it is recommended to mark all questions.

pte.title: PTE Academic (Pearson Test of English)
pte.description: An English proficiency exam with an entirely computer-based and AI-powered evaluation system.
pte.overview_short: PTE Academic is administered by Pearson PLC. Results are usually announced within a few days, which is a great advantage for candidates who need to apply urgently.
pte.dates: Almost every day throughout the year
whyTake: For candidates who want fast results (in 48-72 hours).
100% accepted for UK and Australia registration/education applications.
Provides more objective results thanks to AI-based scoring.

serviceDetails.overview:
PTE Academic: Fast and AI-Powered Language Exam

PTE (Pearson Test of English) Academic is a computer-based language exam scored by AI, with results announced in a very short time. It is accepted worldwide for university admissions and professional career applications.

Its popularity is increasing rapidly among candidates due to more flexible appointment opportunities compared to traditional exams and an exam structure that reduces stress factors.

advantages.title: Fast Results
advantages.desc: Exam results are usually announced within 48 hours, sometimes even on the same day.

advantages.title: Objective Scoring
advantages.desc: Human errors and biases are eliminated with AI-based assessment.

advantages.title: Global Validity
advantages.desc: Accepted by thousands of institutions.

process.title: Exam Format
process.desc: A 2-hour condensed exam structure completed in a single session.

process.title: Preparation Materials
process.desc: Pearson's official interactive preparation platforms and mobile applications.

process.title: Practice Tests
process.desc: Mock exams identical to the actual exam interface.

process.title: Booking
process.desc: Ease of booking 365 days a year, up to 24 hours before the exam.

faq.q: How long is the PTE Academic score valid?
faq.a: PTE results are generally valid for 2 years.

faq.q: How many times can I take the exam?
faq.a: There is no limit, but there must be at least 5 days between two exams.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Speaking & Writing (54-67 min): Personal introduction, reading aloud, summarizing, and essay.
  • Reading (29-30 min): Fill in the blanks, multiple choice questions, and paragraph ordering.
  • Listening (30-43 min): Summarizing, dictation, and interpreting audio recordings.
serviceDetails.scoring:
PTE is scored between 10 and 90 points based on the Global Scale of English.

Advantage: All skills (grammar, fluency, pronunciation, etc.) are analyzed by AI in seconds.

gre.title: GRE (Graduate Record Examination)
gre.description: An international exam used for master's and doctoral program applications.
gre.overview_short: The GRE is organized by the Educational Testing Service (ETS). It is designed for those planning an academic career in a wide range of fields from engineering to social sciences.
whyTake: For those who want to do a master's/doctorate in the USA and Europe.
Strengthens career goals in engineering, natural sciences, and social sciences.
The Quantitative score is of great importance in mathematical sections.

serviceDetails.overview:
GRE: Global Standard of Graduate Education

GRE (Graduate Record Examinations) is required for master's and doctoral applications across a wide range, from engineering to social sciences. It measures analytical writing, verbal reasoning, and quantitative abilities.

Accepted by thousands of graduate and business schools worldwide. It tests candidates' abstract thinking ability and skill in interpreting complex data.

advantages.title: Versatile Acceptance
advantages.desc: Primary requirement for engineering, basic sciences, and social sciences programs.

advantages.title: Flexible Exam Format
advantages.desc: User-friendly exam interface offering the possibility of moving between sections.

advantages.title: MBA Option
advantages.desc: Now accepted by many prestigious business schools (MBA) as an alternative to GMAT.

process.title: Verbal Reasoning
process.desc: Complex text analysis and advanced vocabulary studies.

process.title: Quantitative Ability
process.desc: Gaining speed in geometry, arithmetic, and data interpretation.

process.title: Analytical Writing
process.desc: Argument construction and critical analysis essay techniques.

process.title: ScoreSelect
process.desc: Freedom to send your best results to universities.

faq.q: How long is the GRE score valid?
faq.a: Exam results remain valid for 5 years.

faq.q: How long is the exam duration?
faq.a: With its shortened new format, it takes approximately 1 hour and 58 minutes.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Analytical Writing (30 min): One essay task. Critical thinking and academic writing.
  • Verbal Reasoning (41 min): Two sections. Vocabulary, reading, and comprehension skills.
  • Quantitative Reasoning (47 min): Two sections. Basic math concepts and data analysis.
serviceDetails.scoring:
Verbal and Quantitative sections are scored between 130-170, and the Writing section is scored between 0-6 points.

Tip: With the ScoreSelect® service, you can choose to send only your best score to institutions.

gmat.title: GMAT Focus Edition
gmat.description: An exam designed for candidates applying to business and MBA programs.
gmat.overview_short: GMAT is administered by the Graduate Management Admission Council (GMAC). With the Focus Edition, it has taken on a more analytical and business-focused structure.

sections.name: Data Insights
sections.desc: Graphics and table analysis, data synthesis.

whyTake: For candidates applying to MBA and business master's programs.
Critical for those aiming for a career in management, finance, and strategy.
The primary evaluation criterion in top-tier business schools.

serviceDetails.overview:
GMAT Focus Edition: Leadership Test of the Business World

GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test) is the gold standard used by business schools (MBA) worldwide to evaluate candidates. It consists of Quantitative, Verbal, and Data Insights sections.

GMAT Focus Edition offers a shorter and more focused exam experience optimized according to the changing needs of the business world. It measures candidates' strategic thinking and critical decision-making abilities.

advantages.title: Top MBA Schools
advantages.desc: The strongest weapon for entering giant schools like Harvard, Stanford, and INSEAD.

advantages.title: Data Focus
advantages.desc: With its new format, it emphasizes data analysis skill, which is very critical in business life.

advantages.title: Question Review and Edit
advantages.desc: Allows you to review questions you've answered and edit a specific number of them.

process.title: Quantitative Reasoning
process.desc: Mathematical logic and problem-solving speed studies.

process.title: Verbal Reasoning
process.desc: Critical reasoning and reading comprehension competency.

process.title: Data Insights
process.desc: Techniques for interpreting graphics, tables, and complex data.

process.title: Section Selection
process.desc: Strategy to determine the order of exam sections according to your personal preference.

faq.q: How is GMAT Focus scored?
faq.a: The exam is scored between 205 and 805 in 10-point increments.

faq.q: How often can the exam be taken?
faq.a: You have the right to enter a maximum of 5 times a year and a total of 8 times in your lifetime.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Quantitative Reasoning (45 min): 21 questions. Data sufficiency and problem solving.
  • Verbal Reasoning (45 min): 23 questions. Critical reasoning and reading comprehension.
  • Data Insights (45 min): 20 questions. Multi-source data analysis and graphics interpretation.
serviceDetails.scoring:
The GMAT Focus score is between 205 and 805. All sections are included in the scoring.

Innovation: You now have the right to review wrong answers and change answers for up to 3 questions in each section.

cambridge.title: Cambridge English Qualifications (B2 First, C1 Advanced, C2 Proficiency)
cambridge.description: Exams offering internationally valid and indefinitely valid certificates.
cambridge.overview_short: Cambridge English exams are organized by Cambridge Assessment English. Unlike other exams, the certificates provided do not have an expiration date.

sections.name: Reading & Use of English
sections.desc: Depth of grammar and vocabulary usage.

sections.name: Speaking
sections.desc: Interview conducted by pairing with another candidate.

whyTake: Their certificates are valid for life (indefinitely).
Has a strong academic reputation and acceptance rate in Europe.
Suitable for academic and professional (business) use.

serviceDetails.overview:
Cambridge English: Lifetime Valid Language Certificate

Cambridge English exams (B2 First, C1 Advanced, C2 Proficiency) are among the most prestigious documents proving your English language ability and never expire. Organized by the University of Cambridge, these exams are recognized by more than 25,000 institutions worldwide.

In addition to academic education, these exams, which have great prestige in the professional business world, measure your language skills in depth and improve your practical usage ability.

advantages.title: Lifetime Validity
advantages.desc: Your certificates never expire, you only need to get them once.

advantages.title: In-depth Measurement
advantages.desc: It doesn't just test grammar, it also measures correct usage.

advantages.title: Global Prestige
advantages.desc: Preferred by elite universities worldwide, especially in Europe.

process.title: Level Analysis
process.desc: Determining the targeted certificate level (B2, C1, C2).

process.title: Comprehensive Training
process.desc: Simultaneous development of reading, writing, listening, and speaking skills.

process.title: Paired Interview Practice
process.desc: Dual interaction and scenario studies for the speaking exam.

process.title: Exam Session
process.desc: Application with paper-based or computer-delivered exam options.

faq.q: How long are the exams valid?
faq.a: Cambridge certificates have no expiration date and are valid for life.

faq.q: Which level should I start from?
faq.a: Our experts will determine your current level and set the most suitable certificate goal for you.

serviceDetails.structure:
• Reading & Use of English (90 min): Text analysis and in-depth grammar knowledge.
  • Writing (90 min): Writing articles, letters, or reports.
  • Listening (40 min): Listening and understanding in various contexts.
  • Speaking (15 min): Interview conducted by pairing with another candidate.
serviceDetails.scoring: The Cambridge English Scale system is used. Your level (B2, C1, C2) is certified with scores between 160 and 230+.

Testimonials.label: Our References
Testimonials.title: Success Stories
Testimonials.description: We have shared the dreams of hundreds of our students. Here are frames from their <accent>academic success</accent> journeys.

0.name: Zeynep K.
0.text: Before meeting Mentor Career Consulting, studying law in London was just a dream. I got accepted thanks to their meticulous work on the application process and their touches on my letter of intent. It was the best decision of my life.

1.name: Caner Y.
1.text: I went with zero English, and returned speaking fluently after 6 months. I both had a vacation and learned English on the spot. My consultant's interest continued after I left, I never felt alone.

2.name: Elif & Family
2.text: We were very worried when we sent our 15-year-old daughter abroad for the first time. However, Mentor Career Consulting's sensitivity to security and constant updates really relieved us. Our daughter returned with confidence.

3.name: Mert T.
3.text: The free master's process in Germany seemed complicated, but the team simplified every step so much... Even my visa process went smoothly. The biggest step I took for my career.

testimonials.name: Selin Yılmaz
testimonials.quote: Working with Mentor Career Consulting was the turning point of my life. They added an incredible vision not only in the application process but also in my career planning.

testimonials.name: Can Berk
testimonials.quote: Getting accepted to Harvard seemed impossible, but thanks to strategic portfolio management, my dream came true. I received professional support at every stage.

testimonials.name: Merve Demir
testimonials.quote: The Canadian visa process and school admission went very smoothly with Mentor Career Consulting expertise. I always felt safe.

testimonials.name: Arda Erkan
testimonials.quote: The process of getting accepted to one of the best universities in Europe was very challenging. Mentor Career Consulting's academic depth made a difference.

testimonials.name: Zeynep Kaya
testimonials.quote: Their options and school connections were great in my decision to go to London for language education. It was a tremendous experience.

testimonials.name: Emre Aydın
testimonials.quote: My dream of studying in New York came true. Especially their guidance in scholarship applications was very valuable.

Footer.brandSummary: Mentor Career Consulting - Study Abroad Consultancy
Footer.brandDescription:
At every stage from high school to postgraduate education, Mentor Career leads you for better career planning and educational life. It lists study abroad schools, work & travel opportunities, and language schools that you can choose according to your education level. It guides you in making a choice suitable for your budget and needs. It provides you with up-to-date information by researching the countries where you want to receive education.

"Call us now to make a career planning that can be globally valid with our education consultancy services!"

yurtdisi-universite.title: University Education Abroad
yurtdisi-universite.heroDesc: Join the leaders of the future, from Oxford to Harvard. Build a global career with entrance without exams and scholarship opportunities.
yurtdisi-universite.overview:
Doors to a Global Future

University education abroad with Mentor Career Consulting is not just a diploma, but opening the door to a life without borders. In the UK, you can graduate in 3 years and start your career early, discover your talents with the 'Liberal Arts' system in the USA, or receive free engineering education in Germany.

Estimated Academic Fees (Annual)

CountryProgram TypeAverage Fee
UKBachelor / Master£14,000 - £28,000
USABachelor (Incl. Scholarship)$22,000 - $55,000
Poland / HungaryMedicine / Engineering€4,000 - €12,000
IrelandBachelor / Master€11,000 - €18,000

Academic Preparation and Pathway Programs

  • Foundation: 1-year academic bridge program before Bachelor's.
  • Pre-Master: Academic and language proficiency required for Master's.
  • IY1: Direct equivalent transition program to the first year.
  • Scholarship Counseling: Tracking achievement scholarships from 20% to 100%.

advantages.title: Admission Without Exam
advantages.desc: End the exam stress in Turkey. You can be placed in the world's top 500 universities with only your high school GPA and language proficiency.

advantages.title: Work and Residence
advantages.desc: Gain experience in global companies with work permits up to 2 years in the UK and 3 years in Canada and the USA after graduation.

advantages.title: Cost Advantage
advantages.desc: Studying in Europe at the price of private universities in Turkey, and in America with scholarship options, is more accessible than you think.

advantages.title: Personal Development
advantages.desc: Grow as a visionary individual with high self-confidence, able to stand on your own feet, intertwined with different cultures.

process.title: Goal Setting
process.desc: We create the most suitable country and university list for you with the 'Best Fit' method by analyzing your academic background, budget, and dreams.

process.title: Strong Application
process.desc: We prepare your Statement of Purpose (SOP), CV, and References that will set you apart from your competitors with our professional editors, and make your application error-free.

process.title: Admission and Scholarship
process.desc: We manage admissions from universities, make your scholarship applications if any, and complete your final registration procedures.

process.title: Visa and Travel
process.desc: We meticulously manage country-specific visa procedures and see you off by organizing your accommodation and flight tickets.

faq.q: Can I get YÖK equivalency?
faq.a: Yes. When you graduate from universities in the top 1000 world rankings, you can get direct equivalency. For schools outside the top 1000, YGS/LYS requirements or a Level Placement Exam may be required. As Mentor Career Consulting, we only work with accredited and recognized schools.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Information regarding Mentor Career Consulting data processing purposes and the protection of your personal information.

genel.title: General
genel.content: This website, www.mentor-cc.com, is managed as a Study Abroad and Consultancy based in the UK. When you visit this website, Mentor Career Consulting may collect personal information about you directly or indirectly where appropriate. Mentor Career Consulting uses this personal information in the manner and conditions it desires without being bound by consent and is obliged to ensure the protection of the collected personal information. This Privacy Policy mentions Mentor Career Consulting's data processing purposes related to its own website, the use of identification data, and how to establish your rights regarding your personal information.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Sites
thirdParty.content: Please note that this Privacy Policy does not cover third-party sites connected to this website. Establishment of Your Rights; if you do not want to contact Mentor Career Consulting or receive marketing messages from Mentor Career Consulting, you can contact us. You can always contact us if you have questions about our data processing activities or your transactions related to this website. Our e-mail address is info@mentor-cc.com

processing.title: Data Processing
processing.content: Mentor Career Consulting collects and processes information about customers and visitors to the website for the execution of Study Abroad and Consultancy services, providing information about products and services you are interested in, and for the development of site statistics. The information you provide will be used to reach you when necessary and for uninterrupted communication. Mentor Career Consulting may send promotional brochures, video content, etc., for advertising purposes via e-mail and SMS in line with the information provided. If not requested, it should be reported to us via info@mentor-cc.com or by calling.

data.title: Data
data.content: Mentor Career Consulting does not strive to collect critical personal information such as political opinions, religious beliefs, ethnic origins, health, or other issues through this site and has no such purpose. If Mentor Career Consulting requests such information, your personal permission is obtained. Please note that if you provide unsolicited personal data to Mentor Career Consulting, you have permitted us to use this information as described above.

identification.title: Identification
identification.content: Mentor Career Consulting may collect and analyze data related to the use of this website, including domain name, number of entries to the site, pages visited, duration of stay, sites visited, and length of user session. This data can be collected using a cookie. Identification information will provide faster and easier use of this website.

compensation.title: Indemnification
compensation.content: In case of unauthorized use of the site and the services provided, or if you violate conditions or the law, you agree to pay compensation to Mentor Career Consulting, our employees, and third parties, and to cover legal defense expenses and all kinds of damages. You should cooperate with us in case of any compensation claim. We reserve the right to hire a separate lawyer and to undertake and provide exclusive defense for any issue that requires your indemnification.

corrections.title: Amendments
corrections.content: Mentor Career Consulting reserves the right to make changes to the sections in this Privacy Policy at any time. Please check this Privacy Policy from time to time.

aiUsage.title: Yapay Zeka (AI) Kullanımı ve Veri İşleme
aiUsage.content: Mentor Career Consulting platformu, kullanıcı deneyimini kişiselleştirmek, 'SmartFinder' gibi akıllı eşleştirme algoritmalarıyla size en uygun akademik programları sunmak ve içerik analizlerini otomatize etmek amacıyla gelişmiş Yapay Zeka (AI) teknolojilerini kullanmaktadır. Bu teknolojiler; akademik başarı şansınızı analiz etmek ve size özel danışmanlık rehberliği oluşturmak için verilerinizi (isimsizleştirilmiş veya doğrudan) işleyebilir. Yapay zeka sistemlerimiz, Avrupa Birliği Yapay Zeka Yasası (EU AI Act) ve KVKK prensiplerine tam uyumlu, şeffaf ve insan denetimli bir yapıda tasarlanmıştır.

CookieBanner.title: Cookie and Data Policy
CookieBanner.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience. Your data is secured under the KVKK law No. 6698.

settings.aiDesc: SmartFinder ve akıllı eşleştirme algoritmalarının optimizasyonu.

main.title: International Exam Preparation
main.heroDesc: IELTS, TOEFL, SAT, GRE, and GMAT; strategic exam preparation guidance for global success.
main.overview:
Key to Global Success: International Exams

One of the most important steps to reaching your study abroad and career goals is international exams that prove your academic and language proficiency. At Mentor Career Consulting, we offer you special strategies to get the highest score in prestigious exams like IELTS, TOEFL, SAT, GRE, and GMAT.

Each exam has its own unique structure, question types, and evaluation criteria. Our expert consultants draw the most suitable exam roadmap for you according to the requirements of the university and program you are targeting.

Which Exam Should You Take?

  • ✓ Language Proficiency: IELTS or TOEFL for education in English-speaking countries.
  • ✓ Undergraduate Education (USA): SAT for prestigious universities in America.
  • ✓ Graduate Education: GRE for engineering and social sciences, GMAT for Business (MBA).

advantages.title: Strategic Preparation
advantages.desc: Special study programs focused not only on knowledge but also on exam technique and time management.

advantages.title: Resource Support
advantages.desc: The most up-to-date practice exams, question banks, and interactive preparation materials.

advantages.title: Practice Analysis
advantages.desc: We identify your deficiencies and track your progress with real exam simulations.

advantages.title: Official Registration
advantages.desc: We manage your registration process by guiding you on exam centers and dates.

destinations.title: Popular Exam Guides
destinations.desc: Check out our guides to choose the most suitable exam for your goals and get detailed information.

items.name: IELTS Preparation
items.subDesc: The world standard for Academic and General English proficiency.

items.name: TOEFL iBT
items.subDesc: The most preferred language exam for American universities.

items.name: SAT (Digital)
items.subDesc: Make a difference in US undergraduate applications.

items.name: GRE General
items.subDesc: Global standard in graduate education applications.

items.name: GMAT Focus
items.subDesc: For MBA and Business master's worldwide.

steps.title: Level Assessment
steps.desc: We determine your deficiencies by analyzing your current knowledge level and target score.

steps.title: Program Planning
steps.desc: We create your personalized intensive or standard study schedule that will last until the exam date.

steps.title: Applied Training
steps.desc: We develop tactics for each exam section (Reading, Writing, Listening, Speaking) with our expert instructors and resources.

steps.title: Exam and Results
steps.desc: We ensure you show your best performance in the real exam with exam stress management techniques.

faq.q: Should I take IELTS or TOEFL?
faq.a: This depends on the country and university you are targeting. The UK and Australia prefer IELTS, while the USA usually prefers TOEFL. However, most universities accept both. Our consultants will determine the most advantageous one for you.

faq.q: What are the exam validity periods?
faq.a: IELTS and TOEFL are generally valid for 2 years, while SAT, GRE, and GMAT are valid for 5 years.

main.title: Diploma Equivalency
main.heroDesc: Professional guidance for the recognition of your foreign diploma in Turkey.
main.overview:
Diploma Equivalency Services

With our expert consultancy, we guide you through the process of determining the equivalency of your diplomas obtained abroad (Bachelor's, Master's, Associate's) to diplomas issued in Turkey.

The equivalency application is a meticulous evaluation process carried out by YÖK (Higher Education Council). As Mentor Career Consulting, we provide professional support at every stage, from document preparation to application tracking.

Who needs an Equivalency Application?

  • ✓ Those who want to work in public institutions in Turkey.
  • ✓ Holders of regulated professions such as doctors, engineers, or lawyers who want to practice in Turkey.
  • ✓ Those who want to continue their postgraduate education in Turkey.

advantages.title: Expert Analysis
advantages.desc: We pre-analyze the suitability of your diploma and university for YÖK criteria.

advantages.title: Dossier Preparation
advantages.desc: We prepare professional dossiers in compliance with the law, eliminating the risk of missing documents.

advantages.title: Process Tracking
advantages.desc: We regularly track your application in the YÖK system and inform you of updates.

advantages.title: STS Consultancy
advantages.desc: We provide resource and strategy support for cases where the Level Placement Exam (STS) is required.

destinations.title: Diploma Equivalency Destinations
destinations.desc: Equivalency processes may vary depending on the country you graduated from. Check our special guides for popular countries.

items.name: UK Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Special process for UK graduations with high acceptance rates.

items.name: USA Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Equivalency of US diplomas in the YÖK system.

items.name: Germany Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: German education system and equivalency criteria.

items.name: Canada Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Equivalency and recognition guide for Canadian graduates.

items.name: Switzerland Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Swiss higher education system and equivalency.

items.name: Australia Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Recognition conditions for Australian diplomas in Turkey.

items.name: Belgium Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Step-by-step guide for Belgian university graduates.

items.name: Ireland Diploma Equivalency
items.subDesc: Irish higher education system and equivalency.

process.title: Preliminary Review
process.desc: We analyze the recognition of your university and the equivalency chances of your diploma.

process.title: Document Collection
process.desc: We coordinate your transcript, apostille, and notarized translation processes.

process.title: Online Application
process.desc: We carry out your online application via the YÖK e-equivalency system without errors.

process.title: Physical Submission & Tracking
process.desc: We handle the physical delivery of required documents to YÖK and track the commission's decision.

faq.q: How long does the equivalency process take?
faq.a: If the documents are complete, the commission evaluation usually takes 3-6 months.

faq.q: What is STS (Level Placement Exam)?
faq.a: YÖK may require an exam if the education level does not fully match Turkey or in fields requiring specialization like medicine.

faq.q: What is direct recognition?
faq.a: Graduates from universities in the top 400 world rankings usually receive faster approval.

ingiltere.title: UK Diploma Equivalency
ingiltere.overview:
UK Diploma Equivalency Process

UK universities are generally directly recognized by YÖK since they are top-ranked globally. However, you must obtain an official equivalency certificate to practice your profession in Turkey.

The equivalency of diplomas obtained from the UK is evaluated specifically according to the 'Level' system (NQF/QCF). Different procedures may apply for Bachelor's and Master's degrees.

Important Considerations:

  • ✓ Duration Requirement: Undergraduate education is expected to last at least 3 years, and Master's at least 1 full year.
  • ✓ Apostille: Your educational documents from the UK must be apostilled by the UK Legalisation Office.

advantages.title: Fast Approval
advantages.desc: British universities in the Top 400 list usually get approval without exams (STS).

advantages.title: Global Prestige
advantages.desc: UK diplomas have the highest acceptance rate in the Turkish business world.

process.title: Legalization in UK
process.desc: Formalization of diploma and transcript by UK authorities.

process.title: Translation and Notary
process.desc: Sworn translation and notary approval of documents in Turkey.

process.title: YÖK Application
process.desc: Online pre-application and physical document submission.

faq.q: Is residency required during education?
faq.a: Yes, YÖK requires you to be physically present in the country of education for the duration of the program.

amerika.title: USA Diploma Equivalency
amerika.overview:
US Diploma Equivalency Procedures

The equivalency of diplomas obtained from the United States depends on the university being recognized by regional accreditation bodies in America.

The US education system, with its 4-year undergraduate structure, is fully compatible with the Turkish system. However, equivalency processes for diplomas obtained through online/distance education are examined much more meticulously.

advantages.title: Accreditation Power
advantages.desc: All US universities with regional accreditation have the potential to be recognized by YÖK.

process.title: US Secretary of State Approval
process.desc: Apostille approval of documents at state or federal level.

process.title: Course Syllabi
process.desc: Having course contents ready to be presented, especially for technical departments.

almanya.title: Germany Diploma Equivalency
almanya.overview:
Equivalency Guide for Germany Graduates

Since Germany is part of the Bologna Process, its diplomas show high compatibility with the Turkish system. Fachhochschule and Universität diplomas may be evaluated in different categories.

advantages.title: Bologna Compatibility
advantages.desc: Thanks to the ECTS credit system, the equivalency process is more predictable.

process.title: Regierungspräsidium Approval
process.desc: Approval of documents by the relevant German state authorities.

process.title: Diploma Supplement
process.desc: Preparation of the English or German diploma supplement.

kanada.title: Canada Diploma Equivalency
kanada.overview:
Recognition of the Canadian Education System

The difference between Canadian universities and colleges is critical in the equivalency process. 3-4 year undergraduate programs usually receive equivalency smoothly.

isvicre.title: Switzerland Diploma Equivalency
isvicre.overview:
Equivalency Processes Specific to Switzerland

The equivalency of Swiss schools, especially in the field of Tourism and Hotel Management, varies greatly depending on whether the school is recognized by cantonal authorities or at the federal level.

avustralya.title: Australia Diploma Equivalency
avustralya.overview:
Equivalency of Australian Degrees

Degrees obtained within the framework of the AQF (Australia Qualifications Framework) system are examined by YÖK on a level basis. Due to the long distance, detecting passport entry-exit records is important in this process.

belcika.title: Belgium Diploma Equivalency
belcika.overview:
Belgium Graduation and Turkey Equivalency

In the Belgian education system, which is divided into Flemish and French communities, accredited institutions of both regions have recognition by YÖK.

hollanda.title: Netherlands Diploma Equivalency
hollanda.overview:
Netherlands Research vs Applied Sciences

The distinction between Research Universities (WO) and Universities of Applied Sciences (HBO) can affect your equivalency degree. Mentor Career Consulting guides you through this complex distinction.

irlanda.title: Ireland Diploma Equivalency
irlanda.overview:
Ireland and Global Standards

Long-established universities in cities such as Dublin and Cork generally proceed with standard procedures because they provide education at European standards.

polonya.title: Poland Diploma Equivalency
polonya.overview:
Recognition of Polish Diplomas

Diplomas obtained from Poland, an EU member, are among the most applied for files by YÖK in recent years. STS (Exam) requirements exist in the fields of Medicine and Engineering.

denklik.title: Diploma Equivalency
denklik.desc: Professional guidance for the recognition of your foreign diploma in Turkey.

gre.title: GRE
gre.desc: Graduate Record Examinations. Required for graduate school applications in many countries.

pte.desc: Pearson Test of English. Language exam popular for fast results and AI-based scoring.

Terms.label: LEGAL DOCUMENTS
Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.heroSubtitle: By using the Mentor Career Consulting platform, you agree to the following terms and conditions. This document constitutes a binding contract that regulates the legal relationship between the parties.

taraflar.title: Parties and Subject of the Agreement
taraflar.content:
These Terms of Use ("Terms") constitute a legal agreement between Mentor Career Consulting Ltd ("Mentor Career Consulting", "we", or "the company") and individuals or legal entities ("User") visiting or using the address www.mentor-cc.com and all connected subdomains ("Platform").

By using the Platform, you are deemed to have read, understood, and accepted these Terms. If you do not accept these Terms, we recommend that you do not use the Platform.

Company Information

  • Trade Name: Mentor Career Consulting
  • Email: info@mentor-cc.com

hizmet-kapsami.title: Scope and Nature of Services
hizmet-kapsami.content:
Mentor Career Consulting is a licensed education consultancy firm offering the following services:

  • Study abroad consultancy for high school, associate, undergraduate, and postgraduate levels
  • Language school and summer school program selection and application management
  • Information about visa and equivalency processes
  • Direction to study abroad scholarship opportunities
  • Provision of educational materials, guides, and digital content

Service Limitations

All content on the Platform is for general information purposes only. Mentor Career Consulting:

  • Does not guarantee admission to any university or school.
  • Does not guarantee visa approval; the final decision belongs to the relevant country's authorities.
  • Is not responsible for changes arising from the policies of third-party schools and institutions.
  • Cannot be held responsible for the content of external websites accessed through the Platform.

kullanici-yukumlulukler.title: User Obligations and Prohibitions
kullanici-yukumlulukler.content:
Platform users agree to comply with the following rules:

General Obligations

  • Access and use the Platform only for legal purposes.
  • Enter personal information accurately and completely; do not present misleading information.
  • Protect account information if registered and report unauthorized use immediately.
  • Use respectful language in messages and requests sent through the Platform.

Prohibited Activities

Users must strictly refrain from the following actions:

  • Any attack that will damage the technical infrastructure of the Platform, uploading harmful software or data scraping with bots.
  • Copying, distributing, or modifying content in violation of intellectual property rights.
  • Impersonating other users or creating fake accounts.
  • Sending or sharing illegal, discriminatory, or harassing content.
  • Using automated access tools that would excessively consume Platform resources.
  • Unauthorized commercial advertising and promotion.

fikri-mulkiyet.title: Intellectual Property Rights
fikri-mulkiyet.content:
All content on the Platform — including text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio recordings, digital downloads, data compilations, and software — is the property of Mentor Career Consulting and is protected under international copyright law.

Permitted Use

  • Platform content can be viewed and printed for personal, non-commercial purposes.
  • Partial quotes and references can be made in social media posts by citing the source.

Prohibited Use

  • Reproduction, distribution, or publication of Platform content for commercial purposes is prohibited.
  • The Mentor Career Consulting brand, logo, and trade name cannot be used without written permission.
  • Republication of content by modifying or adapting it is subject to permission.

sorumluluk-sinirlamasi.title: Limitation of Liability and Disclaimer
sorumluluk-sinirlamasi.content:
Mentor Career Consulting accepts no liability to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law in the following matters:

Indirect Damages

Mentor Career Consulting cannot be held responsible for any indirect or unforeseen damages including loss of income, loss of data, loss of reputation, or loss of opportunity arising from the use of the Platform.

Third Party Services

Mentor Career Consulting is not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or services of third-party websites accessed via links on the Platform.

Technical Disruptions

Mentor Career Consulting cannot be held responsible for damages arising from service interruptions caused by server outages, cyber attacks, failures in communication infrastructure, or force majeure events.

gizlilik.content:

ingiltere.title: İngiltere Diploma Denklik
ingiltere.overview:
İngiltere Diploma Denklik Süreci

Birleşik Krallık (İngiltere, İskoçya, Galler, Kuzey İrlanda) üniversiteleri, dünya sıralamalarında en üst sıralarda yer aldığı için YÖK tarafından genellikle doğrudan tanınmaktadır. Ancak mezuniyet sonrası Türkiye'de mesleğinizi icra edebilmek için resmi denklik belgesi almanız şarttır.

İngiltere'den alınan diplomaların denkliği, özellikle 'Level' sistemine (NQF/QCF) göre değerlendirilir. Lisans (Bachelor's) ve Yüksek Lisans (Master's) dereceleri için farklı prosedürler uygulanabilmektedir.

Dikkat Edilmesi Gerekenler:

  • ✓ Süre Şartı: Lisans eğitiminin en az 3 yıl (veya hızlandırılmış programlarda kredi tamamlanmış olması), Yüksek Lisansın en az 1 tam yıl sürmüş olması beklenir.
  • ✓ Apostil: İngiltere'deki eğitim belgelerinizin (Degree Certificate, Transcript) mutlaka UK Legalisation Office tarafından apostillenmiş olması gerekir.

advantages.title: Hızlı Onay
advantages.desc: Top 400 listesindeki İngiliz üniversiteleri genellikle sınavsız (STS) onay alır.

advantages.title: Global Prestij
advantages.desc: İngiltere diploması, Türkiye'deki iş dünyasında en yüksek kabul oranına sahiptir.

process.title: Belgelerin UK'de Onaylanması
process.desc: Diploma ve transkriptin Birleşik Krallık makamlarınca resmileştirilmesi.

process.title: Tercüme ve Noter
process.desc: Belgelerin Türkiye'de yeminli tercüme ve noter onayı yapılması.

process.title: YÖK Başvurusu
process.desc: Online ön başvuru ve fiziki evrak teslimi.

faq.q: Hızlandırılmış (2 yıllık) lisans programlarına denklik verilir mi?
faq.a: YÖK, Avrupa Kredi Transfer Sistemi (ECTS) ve toplam ders yüküne bakarak değerlendirme yapar. Kredi şartı sağlandığında denklik mümkündür.

amerika.title: Amerika Diploma Denklik
amerika.overview:
ABD Diploma Denklik İşlemleri

Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'nden alınan diplomaların denkliği, üniversitenin Amerika'daki bölgesel akreditasyon kurumları (Regional Accreditation) tarafından tanınmış olmasına bağlıdır.

ABD eğitim sistemi 4 yıllık lisans yapısına sahip olduğu için Türkiye'deki lisans sistemiyle tam uyumludur. Ancak online/uzaktan eğitimle alınan diplomaların denklik süreçleri çok daha titizlikle incelenmektedir.

advantages.title: Akreditasyon Gücü
advantages.desc: Bölgesel akreditasyonu olan tüm ABD üniversiteleri YÖK tarafından tanınma potansiyeline sahiptir.

process.title: US Secretary of State Onayı
process.desc: Belgelerin eyalet veya federal düzeyde apostil onayı.

process.title: Ders İçerikleri (Syllabus)
process.desc: Özellikle teknik bölümler için ders içeriklerinin sunulmaya hazır olması.

almanya.title: Almanya Diploma Denklik
almanya.overview:
Almanya Mezunları İçin Denklik Rehberi

Almanya, Bologna Süreci'ne dahil olduğu için diplomaları Türkiye sistemiyle yüksek uyum gösterir. Fachhochschule (Uygulamalı Bilimler) ve Universität diplomaları farklı kategorilerde değerlendirilebilir.

advantages.title: Bologna Uyumu
advantages.desc: ECTS kredi sistemi sayesinde denklik süreci daha öngörülebilirdir.

process.title: Regierungspräsidium Onayı
process.desc: Belgelerin ilgili Alman eyalet makamlarınca onaylanması.

process.title: Diploma Eki (Diploma Supplement)
process.desc: İngilizce veya Almanca diploma ekinin hazır edilmesi.

kanada.title: Kanada Diploma Denklik
kanada.overview:
Kanada Eğitim Sisteminin Tanınırlığı

Kanada üniversiteleri ve kolejleri (Colleges) arasındaki fark denklik sürecinde kritiktir. 3-4 yıllık lisans programları genellikle sorunsuz denklik alırken, 1-2 yıllık 'Diploma' programları 'Lisans' denkliği değil, 'Ön Lisans' veya 'Mesleki Eğitim' olarak değerlendirilebilir.

isvicre.title: İsviçre Diploma Denklik
isvicre.overview:
İsviçre Özelinde Denklik Süreçleri

Özellikle Turizm ve Otel İşletmeciliği alanındaki İsviçre okullarının denkliği, okulun kanton yetkilileri tarafından mı yoksa federal düzeyde mi tanındığına göre büyük farklılık gösterir.

avustralya.title: Avustralya Diploma Denklik
avustralya.overview:
Avustralya Derecelerinin Eşdeğerliği

AQF (Australia Qualifications Framework) sistemi çerçevesinde alınan dereceler, YÖK tarafından seviye bazlı incelenir. Uzak mesafe nedeniyle pasaport giriş-çıkış kayıtlarının tespiti bu süreçte önemlidir.

belcika.title: Belçika Diploma Denklik
belcika.overview:
Belçika Mezuniyeti ve Türkiye Denkliği

Flaman ve Fransız toplulukları olarak ikiye ayrılan Belçika eğitim sisteminde, her iki bölgenin de akredite kurumları YÖK nezdinde tanınırlığa sahiptir.

hollanda.title: Hollanda Diploma Denklik
hollanda.overview:
Hollanda Research vs Applied Sciences

Research Universities (WO) dan Universities of Applied Sciences (HBO) arasındaki ayrım, denklik derecenizi etkileyebilir. Mentor Career Consulting bu karmaşık ayrımda size yol gösterir.

irlanda.title: İrlanda Diploma Denklik
irlanda.overview:
İrlanda ve Global Standartlar

Dublin ve Cork gibi şehirlerdeki köklü üniversiteler, Avrupa standartlarında eğitim verdiği için denklik süreci genellikle standart prosedürde ilerler.

polonya.title: Polonya Diploma Denklik
polonya.overview:
Polonya Diplomalarının Tanınırlığı

AB üyesi olan Polonya'dan alınan diplomalar, son yıllarda YÖK tarafından en çok başvurulan dosyalar arasındadır. Tıp ve Mühendislik alanında STS (Sınav) gereklilikleri mevcuttur.

Legal.disclaimerText: The information on this page is for informational purposes only and may change due to updates by the institutions. Mentor Career Consulting does not accept legal responsibility for the accuracy and timeliness of this information. For the most up-to-date information, please contact our advisors.

yurtdisi-meslek-egitimi.title: Vocational Training Consultancy Abroad
yurtdisi-meslek-egitimi.description: We provide full support for you to participate in international vocational training (Ausbildung) systems. You can earn an income while studying and specializing.

uluslararasi-kariyer.title: International Career Consultancy
uluslararasi-kariyer.description: We draw career roadmaps for professionals who want to step into the global workforce market. We offer sectoral analysis and strategic guidance.

profesyonel-cv.title: Professional CV Creation
profesyonel-cv.description: We prepare a professional, memorable resume (CV) and country-specific cover letter that best reflects your experiences in accordance with international standards.

vize-belge-hazirlik.title: Visa Document Preparation Guidance
vize-belge-hazirlik.description: We manage the process of filing all necessary documents for processes such as work visa, blue card, or opportunity card in a complete and error-free manner.

About.heritageDesc: From high school to postgraduate education, Mentor Career leads you for a better career planning and educational life. It lists study abroad schools, work & travel opportunities, and language schools that you can choose according to your education level. It guides you in making a choice suitable for your budget and needs. It provides up-to-date information by researching the countries you want to study in.
About.heroSubtitle: Call us now to make a career planning that can be globally valid with our education consultancy services!
About.missionDesc: To offer equal opportunities in education and ensure each student is placed in the best educational institution matching their potential.
About.visionDesc: To ensure our students acquire a global vision and to raise them as future leaders.
About.valuesSubtitle: As Mentor Career Consulting, we follow these steps when planning our students' careers:
About.teamSummary: General goal setting, most in-demand professions, identification of professions suitable for you, strengths and weaknesses analysis, and final goal selection.
About.ctaTitle: Let's Build Your Future with a Global Vision
About.ctaSubtitle: Education opportunities in UK, Ireland, Canada, USA, Australia, Poland, Germany, Belgium, Netherlands and Ukraine are waiting for you.

values.transparencyDesc: We perform detailed analyses to determine the most suitable country and program for you.
values.careerDesignDesc: We are with you at all bureaucratic stages from school registrations to acceptance processes.
values.globalVisionDesc: We continue to be with you with our consultancy service during and after your education process.
